text.autoconfig.cleanertooltips.title: Cleaner Tooltips Config
text.autoconfig.cleanertooltips.option.g: Whether attributes should be displayed as icons.
Show a comparison of attributes between the hovered over and equipped item.
Whether an arrow should additionally indicate the comparison.

Whether sharpness should change the attack damage.
This fixes MC-271840.
If an item has attributes that are hidden, display a hint. "[+]"

Whether to display the mining speed of tools.
Note: only takes efficiency into account, effects like haste
or being under water are not taken into account.
text.autoconfig.cleanertooltips.option.d:
Whether the durability of items should be displayed.
This also works without using the icon attributes.

Change the position of the durability.

INLINE displays it in the same row as the attributes, BELOW directly under the
attributes and BOTTOM displays it at the bottom of the tooltip.
Note that if icon attributes are disabled, both INLINE and BELOW do the same.
Whether to include the maximum durability of an item.
Whether the color of the durability should change based on the remaining durability.
text.autoconfig.cleanertooltips.option.a: Only compare attributes both items have.

Change the way multiple equipment slot groups are displayed.

ROWS displays each slot group in a different row, INLINE displays them in the same row
and PRIMARY only displays the slot group matching the item, e.g. mainhand for swords.
Note: Usually items don't have multiple slot groups, in which case this setting is ignored.
